case_title: CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY VS. SARA B MARTINEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, SARA B $4,363.07 PRINCIPAL, $350.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,713.07, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100107960), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK SERVED JAN-10-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JAN-23-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, SARA B
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100107960) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $1,625.69 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 210078673) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS {C.C.P. 1033} (TRANSACTION ID # 100107960) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, SARA B

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $350.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100107960) AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, SARA B
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-15-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, SARA B DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-15-2020
